name: End Tone
description: The current tone type used to alert either an end of cook or an end of timer to the user.
comment: End Tone: Enum writable select.

name: Convection Conversion
description: Specifies whether convection conversion is enabled.
comment: Convection Conversion: Boolean writable switch.

name: Key Pressed
description: The last key that was pressed on the user interface.
comment: Key Pressed: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Oven Configuration
description: The appliance hardware configuration specifying the existence of components and features.
comment: Oven Configuration: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Oven Minimum and Maximum Temperatures
description: The minimum and maximum values that can be set for a cook mode.
comment: Oven Minimum and Maximum Temperatures: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Warming Drawer Power Level
description:
The power level of the warming drawer.
The warming drawer cannot be started remotely, but once started, it can be updated remotely.
comment: Warming Drawer Power Level: Enum writable select.

name: Timer ERD Availability
description: The availability of timers in a system.
comment: Timer ERD Availability: Availability flags for timers.

name: Knob Mode Setting
description: The cycle utilized when the knob is in the 200-550 range. When writing, level must be listed as available in available bake cycle ERD 0x5013.
comment: Knob Mode Setting: Enum writable select.

name: Bake Cycle Availability
description: The availability of bake cycles when "Bake" is activated.
comment: Bake Cycle Availability: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Auto Oven Light On Off Request
description:
The current setting for the oven light to automatically turn on (for the duration of a cookmode)
and timeout, simply timeout, or be fully manually controlled.
comment: Auto Oven Light On Off Request: Enum writable select.

name: Auto Oven Light Availability
description: The available automatic/manual oven light modes that the unit supports

data.name: Oven Light Auto On During Cycle for Haier Knob ONLY
Oven Light Auto On During Cycle

comment: Auto Oven Light Availability: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Broil Level
description: The broil setting applied when user starts a broil cycle. When writing, level must be listed as available in available broil levels ERD 0x5017.
comment: Broil Level: Enum writable select.

name: Broil Level Availability
description: The availability of broil levels when "Broil" is activated.
comment: Broil Level Availability: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Cavity Layout
description: The layout of the cavities for double cavity configurations, this value has no meaning for single cavity configurations
comment: Cavity Layout: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Clock Display Request
description: Request clock display to be enabled/disabled. Acceptance of write can be read in ERD 0x501A.
comment: Clock Display Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Clock Display Status
description: Whether the clock is displayed.
comment: Clock Display Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

data.name: Door Open During Bake and Elements Deactivated Cavity 1
Door Open During Bake and Elements Deactivated Cavity 2

comment: Mis-use Push Notifications: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Accent Lighting Request
description:
Settings related to product accent lighting.
- Custom Color Active - sets whether the custom color code should be used.  When true, the custom color will override the color temperature.
- Brightness - Sets the brightness of both knob backlights and tasklights.  This should be between the min/max in ERD 0x5025.
- Temperature - Sets the color temperature (warmer/cooler).  This should be between the min/max in ERD 0x5025.
- Custom Color Code - Sets a custom accent color.  Only used if ERD 0x5025 indicates custom color is available and Custom Color Active is true.
comment: Accent Lighting Request: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Accent Lighting Status
description: Current accent lighting settings.
comment: Accent Lighting Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Accent Lighting Supported Settings
description: Indicates what lighting settings are available
comment: Accent Lighting Supported Settings: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Air Fry Oven Minimum and Maximum Temperatures
description: The minimum and maximum values that can be set for Air Fry.
comment: Air Fry Oven Minimum and Maximum Temperatures: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Articulating Display Mode
description:
The mode of articulation for the Articulating UI Screen.
This UI screen rotates out from the range so that the user has a good viewing angle.
Auto Mode means that the UI articulates automatically when the user turns on the cooktop.
Manual means that the UI articulates whenever a button is pressed to extend or retract.
comment: Articulating Display Mode: Temperature display preference setting (read-only).

name: Articulating Display Mode Request
description:
The client desired mode of articulation for the Articulating UI Screen.
This UI screen rotates out from the range so that the user has a good viewing angle.
Auto Mode means that the UI articulates automatically when the user turns on the cooktop.
Manual means that the UI articulates whenever a button is pressed to extend or retract.
comment: Articulating Display Mode Request: Temperature display preference setting (select).

name: Articulating Display Position
description:
The actual orientation of the Articulating UI Screen.
This UI screen rotates out from the range so that the user has a good viewing angle.
Extended means that the screen is rotated out.
Retracted means that the screen is flush with the range chassis.
comment: Articulating Display Position: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Articulating Display Position Request
description:
The client desired orientation of the Articulating UI Screen.
This UI screen rotates out from the range so that the user has a good viewing angle.
To Extend is to rotate out the screen.
To retract is to make the screen be flush with the range chassis.
comment: Articulating Display Position Request: Enum writable select.

name: Automatic Door Opener Local Public Enable
description: Enables the automatic door opener (voice to open). There is an agreement in place with UL that this enable must set on the unit, so this ERD needs to remain local-only. This ERD is intended as a unit wide request in coordination with cavity statuses in 5118 and 5218.
comment: Automatic Door Opener Local Public Enable: Boolean writable switch.

name: Oven Light Auto On Off State
description:
The current setting for the oven light to automatically turn on (for the duration of a cookmode)
and timeout, simply timeout, or be fully manually controlled.
comment: Oven Light Auto On Off State: Enum writable select.

name: Enhanced Sabbath State
description: The current state of Enhanced Sabbath mode
comment: Enhanced Sabbath State: Sabbath mode toggle.

name: Enhanced Sabbath Cooking Accepted Request
description:
This ERD is used to accept/cancel an Enhanced Sabbath/Holiday cook mode, given the current Enhanced Sabbath State (ERD 0x502E).

1. To to accept the cooking prompt, set this ERD to true while the State is 'Prompt Sabbath' (1) or 'Prompt Holiday' (2). (State will become 'Cooking Accepted, Sabbath Pending' (3) or 'Cooking Accepted, Holiday Pending' (4), respectively.)

2. To revoke acceptance, set this ERD to false while the the State is 'Cooking Accepted, Sabbath Pending' (3) or 'Cooking Accepted, Holiday Pending' (4). (State will revert to 'Prompt Sabbath' (1) or 'Prompt Holiday' (2), respectively.)

3. To cancel an active Sabbath/Holiday cook mode, set this ERD to false while the the State is 'Sabbath Active, Warm' (7), 'Holiday Active, Warm' (8), or 'Holiday Active, Bake' (9). (State will become 'Sabbath Active, No Cooking' (5) or 'Holiday Active, No Cooking' (6), resepctively.)

The client is responsible for resetting this ERD to false after the Sabbath/Holiday period ends.

See status ERD 0x5030.
comment: Enhanced Sabbath Cooking Accepted Request: Sabbath mode toggle.

name: Enhanced Sabbath Cooking Accepted Status
description:
The current state of whether Enhanced Sabbath cooking has been accepted.

See request ERD 0x502F.
comment: Enhanced Sabbath Cooking Accepted Status: Sabbath mode toggle.

name: Enhanced Sabbath Warmness Setting Request
description:
Request to set the warmness level for Enhanced Sabbath warm cycles.
See status ERD 0x5032.
comment: Enhanced Sabbath Warmness Setting Request: Sabbath mode toggle.

name: Enhanced Sabbath Warmness Setting Status
description:
The current warmness setting for Enhanced Sabbath warm cycles.
See request ERD 0x5031.
comment: Enhanced Sabbath Warmness Setting Status: Sabbath mode toggle.

name: Enhanced Shabbos Keeper Is Connected Status
description: The current state of whether the Enhanced Shabbos Keeper is connected.
comment: Enhanced Shabbos Keeper Is Connected Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Cook Cam AI Assistant Enabled Request
description:
Writing to this ERD will request to change the state of the Cook Cam AI Assistant feature.

See ERD 0x504F for the Cook Cam AI Assistant Enabled Status.
comment: Cook Cam AI Assistant Enabled Request: Boolean writable switch.

name: Cook Cam AI Assistant Enabled Status
description:
Stores the state of the Cook Cam AI Assistant feature. This ERD is not written directly; instead,
a state change can be requested by writing to the request ERD 0x504E.

See ERD 0x504E for the Cook Cam AI Assistant Enabled Request.
comment: Cook Cam AI Assistant Enabled Status: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Cook Cam Image Capture Signal
description: Signal incremented by the MC to indicate that the UI should capture an image and evaluate.
comment: Auto-suggested: Cook Cam Image Capture Signal

name: Cook Cam Image Upload Enabled Setting Request
description: User setting to enable or disable cook cam image uploads to the cloud. User consent is required. Client should request settings updates via this ERD.

comment: Auto-suggested: Cook Cam Image Upload Enabled Setting Request

name: AI Bake Oven Status
description: The status of the active AI session on the unit to the cloud. Doneness Level Selected is only valid in Doneness Selected state. User Satisfaction Selected is only valid in User Feedback State. See https://github.com/geappliances/documentation.ai-bake
comment: AI Bake Oven Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: AI Bake Cloud Status
description: The status of the active AI session on the cloud to the unit. Food Type is an NULL terminated string of the name of the food identified. Invalid in the Valid Doneness Levels should always be true. See https://github.com/geappliances/documentation.ai-bake
comment: AI Bake Cloud Status: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Heartbeat Tick From Client

name: Local Available Cook Modes Cavity 1
description:
A bitmask representing the raw cook modes that are actually available
   in the cooking engine on the appliance.
   See also 0x5113.lua/0x5213.lua, which is remote available cook modes, representing the
   cook modes that are available to the app with additional bits for cook timer and probe
   availability.
comment: Auto-suggested: Local Available Cook Modes Cavity 1

name: Upper Cavity Current Cycle Stage
description:
The user stage of the current cook including the stage number and a bitmap of conditions required to advance to the next stage. A bitmap of `0` indicates that the stage will automatically advance.

Note: this is the stage reflected to the UI/user, it is not indicitive of the actual "stage" of the cook engine.
comment: Upper Cavity Current Cycle Stage: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Upper Oven Advance Cook Stage
description: This signal is intended to be incremented by clients to indicate the user has met conditions to advance the stage of a user interactive precision cook.
comment: Upper Oven Advance Cook Stage: Single numeric writable value.

name: Lower Oven Cook Mode
description: The cook operation that is currently running on the lower oven.

values.24: Convection Bake Timed Shutoff Delay Start
values.25: Convection Bake Timed Warm Delay Start
values.26: Convection Bake Timed TwoTemp Delay Start
values.33: Convection Multi-Bake Timed Shutoff Delay Start
values.34: Convection Multi-Bake Timed Warm Delay Start
values.35: Convection Multi-Bake Timed Two-Temp Delay Start
values.42: Convection Roast Timed Shutoff Delay Start
values.43: Convection Roast Timed Warm Delay Start
values.44: Convection Roast Timed Two-Temp Delay Start

comment: Lower Oven Cook Mode: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Lower Oven Current State
description: The current state of the lower oven.
comment: Lower Oven Current State: Enum read-only sensor.

name: Lower Oven Delay Time Remaining
description: The number of minutes remaining when delaying before a cook operation on the lower oven.
comment: Lower Oven Delay Time Remaining: Timer/duration value.

name: Lower Oven Probe Display Temperature
description: The temperature of the probe in the lower oven.
comment: Lower Oven Probe Display Temperature: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Lower Oven Cook Time Remaining
description: The number of minutes remaining before a cook operation completes on the lower oven.
comment: Lower Oven Cook Time Remaining: Timer/duration value.

name: Lower Oven Display Timer
description: The number of minutes remaining for the timer on the user interface for the lower oven.
comment: Lower Oven Display Timer: Timer/duration value.

name: Lower Oven User Temperature Offset
description: The temperature offset for the user used when cooking on the lower oven.
comment: Lower Oven User Temperature Offset: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Lower Oven Probe Present
description: Specifies whether the probe is present in the lower oven.
comment: Lower Oven Probe Present: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Lower Oven Elapsed Cook Time
description: The number of minutes the lower oven has been performing a cook operation.
comment: Lower Oven Elapsed Cook Time: Single numeric read-only sensor.

name: Lower Oven Display Temperature
description: The temperature currently displayed to the user on the lower oven.
comment: Lower Oven Display Temperature: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Lower Oven Remote Enabled
description: Specifies whether a cook mode can be started remotely for the lower oven.
comment: Lower Oven Remote Enabled: Boolean read-only binary sensor.

name: Lower Oven Available Cook Modes
description:
The list of cook modes that are supported by the lower oven.
Modes continue in ERD 0x5213 Lower Oven Available Extended Cook Modes.

data.name: Convection Roast Timed Warm Delay Start
Convection Roast Timed TwoTemp Delay Start
Convection Multi-Bake Timed Warm Delay Start
Convection Multi-Bake Timed Two-Temp Delay Start
Convection Bake Timed Warm Delay Start
Convection Bake Timed TwoTemp Delay Start

comment: Lower Oven Available Cook Modes: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.

name: Lower Oven Temperature
description: The lower oven temperature.
comment: Lower Oven Temperature: Temperature sensor, unit not explicitly specified.

name: Request Lower Door Open
description: Writing true to this will attempt to open the lower cavity door. After door open is attempted, control will clear this to false.
comment: Request Lower Door Open: Enum writable select.

name: Lower Oven Door State
description: The lower oven door state.
comment: Lower Oven Door State: Door open/closed binary sensor.

name: Lower Oven Light Level
description: The current light setting. When writing, level must be listed as available in available light levels ERD 0x5212. If 0x5212 has "Infinite" set, then the Light Level is % with max 100.
comment: Lower Oven Light Level: Enum writable select.

name: Lower Oven Light Level Availability
description: The availability of light levels.
comment: Lower Oven Light Level Availability: Multi-field sensor, may need custom handling to extract individual values.
